node.text: Evan went on a vacation in Canada with their new significant other where they did activities like hiking and biking.

node.text: Evan took his family on a road trip to Jasper last weekend, driving through the Icefields Parkway.

node.text: Evan finds peace and clarity in nature and views it as a great healer.
Evan gifted a 1968 Kustom K-200A vintage guitar from a close friend.
Evan recommends a recipe for energy balls as a healthier snack idea.
